ksa_text: Report to board, audit committee, and executive leadership on data and AI risk posture, program maturity, regulatory compliance status, value realization, and strategic progress against roadmap commitments.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the task contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('report board'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4167); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
